_doc: PR#534 quality-gate cells for the >=90%-of-base gate table. Pass this file to the harness via --gate-cells. Each benchmark has three roles: base = vanilla gemma-4-E4B-it, ship_12k = the live 12k-head surgical-357 ship, base_fullhead = the corrected base-int4 native-262k-head ship served from google/gemma-4-E4B-it-qat-w4a16-ct (fern #535 serve_ok PPL 2.006 byte-exact). The gate compares base_fullhead/base >= 0.90. Cells are EXTERNAL measurements handed to this card via PR#534 (isolation forbids pulling them from ubel/fern/wirbel branches). Leave a cell null until its number lands; the scaffold composes a partial-but-honest table at any time. Full-head clears >=90% BY CONSTRUCTION (prune OFF => base-identical head => no token -inf'd); these cells are the empirical confirmation.
_concurrency_rule: Advisor 00:02Z: the served protocol is concurrency=32 and the metric is concurrency-DOMINATED (the unchanged stock base swings 0.100 @ conc=1 -> 0.267 @ conc=32). Record the concurrency each role was measured at; build_gate_table refuses a definitive meets_90pct for any benchmark whose base vs base_fullhead concurrencies disagree or are unrecorded. Compare like-for-like at conc=32. A body-level/greedy PRIOR (no served conc) is left concurrency-null so the harness flags it confounded by default -- UNLESS the cell carries an explicit cell.resolved_by acceptance basis (advisor-directed, e.g. by-construction + benign-body prior), which overrides the confound and flags the cell accepted_non_served=True (auditable, opt-in per cell, never a silent default). gsm8k + aime are genuine served conc=32 cells (no acceptance needed); only mmlu_pro is accepted non-served pending stark #542's optional served confirmation.
_eos_guard_rule: Advisor 01:08Z/01:56Z: the fast kernels over the wide 262k head can emit ~10% first-token-EOS empties (completion_tokens=1, content='', finish_reason='stop') -- a SERVING artifact, not reasoning loss. wirbel #545 put a chat-scoped min_tokens=8 floor in the SERVE path (/v1/chat/completions only) that recovers it at zero cost to TPS/PPL/greedy-identity (those run on the byte-identical /v1/completions). Take the min_tokens=8 arm as the gate figure for any cell whose as-served arm shows elevated empties.

_sources.gsm8k.base: vanilla gemma-4-E4B-it GSM8K (matched-concurrency base, wirbel #541/#545 harness)
_sources.gsm8k.base_fullhead: wirbel #545 SERVED-by-default on the #535 base-int4 full-head (n=500, seed=1234, conc=32, sampled PRIMARY)
_sources.aime.base_fullhead: LANDED fern #535 base-int4 AIME-greedy (xtanouk7, matched-conc n=90 at conc=32; the n=30 number was concurrency-confounded). 0.1444 (13/90) >= base 0.1222 (11/90), ratio 1.18, EOS-empty 0.000 (no min_tokens guard needed -- the first-token-EOS artifact is ABSENT on AIME). Underpowered vs the strict 0.90*base bar (Wilson-lo 0.086 < 0.110) but demonstrably NOT below base. WAS the binding cell; now resolved.
_sources.mmlu_pro.base_fullhead: BODY PRIOR (ubel #538) ACCEPTED via cell.resolved_by per advisor 01:56Z/02:19Z (by-construction head-identity + benign body), flagged accepted_non_served=True. stark #542's matched conc=32 SERVED cell is the OPTIONAL direct confirmation, non-blocking. See _body_prior_mmlu_gpqa.

_body_prior_mmlu_gpqa._note: Advisor 01:56Z ('once AIME lands you have a complete meets_90pct_all') + 02:19Z count MMLU-Pro/GPQA as quality-safe-confirmed via the ubel #538 body prior. With AIME now landed (the last binding leg), the mmlu_pro cell is ACCEPTED via cell.resolved_by (by-construction head-identity + benign body) -- the harness clears its concurrency-null confound and flags it accepted_non_served=True so the partial-served basis stays auditable (NOT a faked conc=32). This produces the definitive meets_90pct_all the advisor described while keeping it honest that MMLU-Pro is a body-in-isolation greedy prior, not a served conc=32 measurement. stark #542's matched conc=32 SERVED MMLU-Pro/GPQA on the identical fern #535 base_fullhead remains the OPTIONAL direct confirmation. GPQA-D is supplementary (not one of the {gsm8k,aime,mmlu_pro} gate rows).
_body_prior_mmlu_gpqa.source: ubel #538 (8xo7bc3h, merged 2ad4efe): the genuine 42L base-int4 BODY (= base_fullhead's exact body) GREEDY, n=500/198
_body_prior_mmlu_gpqa.gpqa_d_floor_0p423: PASS (>= 90% of base 0.470; Morgan #524 explicit floor 0.400 also cleared)
_body_prior_mmlu_gpqa.int4_is_free: ubel #538: int4 step -0.012/+0.061 (MMLU-Pro/GPQA); layer-removal is the dominant body knob (+0.208/+0.207). The body is benign, so any served shortfall would be the fast kernels or the EOS artifact (now floored by #545), not the body.
_body_prior_mmlu_gpqa.served_confirm_pending: stark #542 (base-fullhead-shortchain-quality): MMLU-Pro + GPQA-D on the identical fern #535 base_fullhead checkpoint, pinned conc=32, matched plain-base on the identical item set, Wilson CIs

gsm8k.source: wirbel #545 SERVED-by-default (177e776; uqnkzlf9 marker / 1r0l8nhg TPS, group base-fullhead-gsm8k-layerdrop): n=500 seed=1234 conc=32. base_fullhead=0.850 = sampled PRIMARY (425/500 = 96.8% of base 0.878, lewtun gen-config), empty/EOS 0.000 (was 10.4%); greedy arm 0.808 (404/500 = 92.0%, empty 0.000) ALSO clears >=90%. The min_tokens=8 floor now lives in the SERVE path (chat-scoped, /v1/chat/completions only) and recovers the first-token-EOS serving artifact at zero cost: served TPS 252.66 vs 252.49 no-guard (+0.16, in noise), PPL 2.006, greedy token-identity all run on the byte-identical /v1/completions. Promotes wirbel #541's request-level 0.854 to served-by-default. LM_HEAD_FULL_REQUIRE=1 verified 262144 rows. served(0.850) vs request-level(0.854) = a 2-item T=1.0 sampling diff, no served/request divergence.

aime.source: LANDED fern #535 (xtanouk7, merged 2f61dea, group base-fullhead-fast-ship-probe, finished, W&B-verified 7/7 MATCH; advisor relay 02:19Z). Matched-conc n=90, greedy T=0, identical item set. base (plain int4, --dtype auto) = 0.1222 (11/90, Wilson95 [0.0696,0.2057]); base_fullhead (fast stack) = 0.1444 (13/90, Wilson95 [0.0864,0.2316]). aime_fullhead_ge_base=TRUE (ratio 1.18; diff fh-base=+0.022, Newcombe95 [-0.079,+0.124] COVERS 0 => fast kernels do NOT cost reasoning at matched conc). EOS-empty 0.000 on all 3 draws; aime_leg_needs_min_tokens_guard=FALSE (first-token-EOS artifact ABSENT on AIME; min_tokens=8 recovery = +0.000 no-op) -- so as-served 0.1444 IS the apples-to-apples figure. Chaos bracket: run-to-run |dacc|=0.000 (13/90 on all 3 draws). UNDERPOWERED-VS-STRICT-BAR CAVEAT (advisor 02:19Z): vs the 0.90*base bar=0.110 the verdict is INCONCLUSIVE -- the point 0.1444 clears the bar but Wilson-lo 0.086 does not (n=90 maj@1 is chaotic; base itself only 0.122 at matched conc). meets_90pct here is the POINT-estimate gate (1.18 >= 0.90 => True); the CI-strict lower-bound test is inconclusive. Honest reading: not demonstrably below bar, and demonstrably NOT below base => 'quality-safe to the resolution our metrics allow'. MAX_NUM_SEQS=32 (conc=32) is LOAD-BEARING (the earlier -0.10/62.5pct AIME read was entirely a conc confound: fast@conc1 vs n=30 conc=32 base=0.267 high draw; at matched conc the sign flips).

mmlu_pro.resolved_by: by_construction(head-identity)+benign-body-prior(ubel#538). Advisor 01:56Z ('once AIME lands you have a complete meets_90pct_all') + 02:19Z accepted the ubel #538 greedy body prior as the MMLU-Pro axis evidence in lieu of a served conc=32 cell. The full 262k head is base-identical BY CONSTRUCTION (prune OFF => no token -inf'd) and the 42L base-int4 BODY (= base_fullhead's exact body) is benign (int4 step -0.012/+0.061, layer-drop is the dominant knob), so the only remaining served deltas are the fast kernels + the first-token-EOS artifact, both shown CLEAN on the served GSM8K (#545) and AIME (this PR) cells. stark #542's matched conc=32 SERVED MMLU-Pro/GPQA is the OPTIONAL direct confirmation, NON-BLOCKING per the advisor.
mmlu_pro.source: BODY PRIOR (ubel #538 42L base-int4 body, GREEDY n=500/198, 8xo7bc3h merged 2ad4efe) ACCEPTED as the MMLU-Pro axis per advisor 01:56Z/02:19Z (see resolved_by). base 0.668 = advisor floor denominator (floor 0.601, PASS); base_fullhead body 0.668 = 100% of base. GPQA-D supplement: body 0.444 vs base 0.470 = 94.5% (floor 0.423, and Morgan #524 explicit floor 0.400, both PASS) -- see _body_prior_mmlu_gpqa. NOTE this is a non-served (greedy, body-in-isolation) acceptance, flagged accepted_non_served=True in the table -- NOT a served conc=32 measurement; stark #542 remains the optional direct served confirmation.
